user.title: API Key
user.description:
Enter your Trafiklab Realtime API key.

You can find or create keys at: https://developer.trafiklab.se/

stop.title: Stop ID
stop.description: Enter the numeric Stop ID you want to monitor.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter departures to keep your dashboard clean.

time_windows.title: Active Polling Windows
time_windows.description: Enter time ranges when you want the sensor to poll frequently (e.g., 07:00-09:00, 16:00-18:00). Leave empty for 24/7 polling.

error.invalid_api_key: The API key provided was rejected (403).
error.invalid_stop_id: The stop ID could not be found (404).
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Trafiklab servers.
error.unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred. Check logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This stop and line combination is already configured.

init.title: Adjust Settings
init.description: Update filters or polling windows for this stop.
